title: 20Pcs 2 Inch Snow Tipped Natural Pine Cones, 5 Inch Green Pine Cone Sticks for Craft Garland Xmas Tree Decorations Wreath Ornaments Home Party Holiday Decor
features: 【Package Includes】20 large pine cones, 20 green picks, Insert the green pick into the pine cone base, which can be used to decorate your home, Christmas tree or other places to enhance the festive atmosphere.
【Spruce Pine Cones】each pine cone is about 2 to 3 inches in diameter, and with the pick length of 12cm/5 inches, it is suitable for you to stick to target places, which can be applied to many crafts.

【Natural Pine Cones】YUNSTK all of the pine cones are natural, with white dots on the surface, they are very pretty in look, and the picks are made from quality plastic, sturdy and durable, suitable for decorating both indoors and outdoors.

【Pinecones Decorations】They are all-natural pinecones. The size, shape, and color may vary slightly, every Christmas decorative pinecone is unique. Proper size for a bowl, vase, lantern, or hurricane candle display.

【Wide Usage】Suitable for DIY crafts making, table decoration, photo props, gift packing; stick them on the tree, garland or wreath, wonderful decoration for autumn and winter, Christmas, birthday, wedding, and other occasions.
description: Product description 20 Pieces 2 Inch Christmas Pine Cones Snow-Tipped Natural Pine Cone with a Pick Ideal Christmas decor: These pine cones are ideal for decorating Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, rattan, etc, helping to create a more Christmas atmosphere. Special design: Painted white color on the tip, which make these pine cones look like they are dipped in snow, and there is pick on each cone, easy and convenient to use. Specifications: Diameter: approx 5 cm/ 2 inch Color: brown with white tip Package includes: 20 x Pine cones with pick Safety Warning Small parts may pose a choking hazard. Product contains sharp plastic parts.
